meta.name: Get Shop LIVE Performance Per Minutes

document_api_meta.title: Get Shop LIVE Performance Per Minutes
document_api_meta.env_desc:
Get the Live session performance break down to every minutes, after the live session is finished.
This API only returns data of live streams hosted by shop official account or marketing account.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: page_token
request_query_param.desc: Page token, indicating the current position. The page_token is empty by default, indicating first position.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: request_id
response_param.desc: Request log

response_param.name: data
response_param.desc: Specific return information

response_param.name: ^performance
response_param.desc: Performance

response_param.name: ^^overall
response_param.desc: Overall

response_param.name: ^^^live_title
response_param.desc: LIVE session title

response_param.name: ^^^start_time
response_param.desc: Start time of the LIVE, unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00).

response_param.name: ^^^end_time
response_param.desc: End time of the LIVE, unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00).

response_param.name: ^^^duration
response_param.desc: LIVE session duration in seconds

response_param.name: ^^^gmv
response_param.desc: The total amount paid for orders placed directly from the LIVE, including returns and refunds.

response_param.name: ^^^^amount
response_param.desc: GMV amount in the corresponding currency.

response_param.name: ^^^^currency
response_param.desc: GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP).

response_param.name: ^^^items_sold
response_param.desc: The number of items sold directly from the LIVE.

response_param.name: ^^^unique_viewers
response_param.desc: The number of unique viewers in the LIVE room.

response_param.name: ^^^impressions
response_param.desc: The total number of times the LIVE was displayed to viewers.

response_param.name: ^^intervals
response_param.desc: Intervals

response_param.name: ^^^start_time
response_param.desc: Start time of this interval, unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00).

response_param.name: ^^^end_time
response_param.desc: End time of this interval, unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00).

response_param.name: ^^^sales
response_param.desc: Sales performace

response_param.name: ^^^^gmv
response_param.desc: The total amount paid for orders placed directly within this interval, including returns and refunds.

response_param.name: ^^^^^amount
response_param.desc: GMV amount in the corresponding currency.

response_param.name: ^^^^^currency
response_param.desc: GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP).

response_param.name: ^^^^items_sold
response_param.desc: The number of items sold directly within this interval.

response_param.name: ^^^^customers
response_param.desc: The total number of customers who placed orders within this interval, including customers who made returns or refunds.

response_param.name: ^^^^sku_orders
response_param.desc: The total number of paid SKU orders placed within this interval.

response_param.name: ^^^^main_orders
response_param.desc: Total number of paid main orders placed. Main orders refer to the single purchase transaction a customer makes.

response_param.name: ^^^traffic
response_param.desc: Traffic

response_param.name: ^^^^viewers
response_param.desc: The number of viewers within this interval.

response_param.name: ^^^^views
response_param.desc: The number of views or viewings in the LIVE room.

response_param.name: ^^^^product_impressions
response_param.desc: Total number of times a product was viewed in LIVE, including product list and product card clicks.

response_param.name: ^^^^ctr
response_param.desc: The number of clicks divided by numbers of views of the LIVE during selected time period including clicks on product lists and product cards

response_param.name: ^^^^enter_room_rate
response_param.desc: LIVE views per LIVE room impressions.

response_param.name: ^^^^product_clicks
response_param.desc: Total number of product link clicks from LIVE streams, including product list and product card clicks.

response_param.name: ^^^^impressions
response_param.desc: The total number of times the LIVE was displayed to viewers.

response_param.name: ^^^interactions
response_param.desc: Interactions

response_param.name: ^^^^new_followers
response_param.desc: Number of viewers who followed creator from the LIVE video

response_param.name: ^^^^shares
response_param.desc: Total number of shares of a LIVE.

response_param.name: ^^^^comments
response_param.desc: Total number of comments for a LIVE.

response_param.name: ^^^^likes
response_param.desc: The number of likes in the LIVE room.

response_param.name: ^^^^comment_rate
response_param.desc: Total number of comments during the LIVE divided by the number of views.

response_param.name: ^^^^follow_rate
response_param.desc: Number of users that followed the creator during the LIVE divided by the number of views.

response_param.name: ^^^^like_rate
response_param.desc: Total number of likes during the LIVE divided by the number of views.

response_param.name: ^^^^share_rate
response_param.desc: Total number of times the LIVE was shared divided by the total number of views.

response_param.name: ^^^conversion
response_param.desc: Conversion

response_param.name: ^^^^avg_price
response_param.desc: Average direct GMV per main order. Also known as AOV (main order)

response_param.name: ^^^^^amount
response_param.desc: GMV amount in the corresponding currency.

response_param.name: ^^^^^currency
response_param.desc: GMV currency code (ISO 4217 standard). If LOCAL currency is requested, the value will be the local currency code of where the shop is registered (e.g. GBP).

response_param.name: ^^^^click_to_order_rate
response_param.desc: Click to order rate

response_param.name: ^^^^^sku_order_ctor
response_param.desc: The percentage of times viewers clicked product links in LIVE streams and placed a direct order.

response_param.name: ^^^^^main_order_ctor
response_param.desc: Percentage of times viewers who clicked LIVE product links also placed a main order.

response_param.name: ^^^^gpm
response_param.desc: GPM

response_param.name: ^^^^^watch_gpm
response_param.desc: The Watch GPM is the average GMV generated from 1,000 views of the LIVE.

response_param.name: ^^^^^show_gpm
response_param.desc: The average GMV generated from 1,000 impressions of the LIVE.

response_param.name: ^^^^created_sku_orders
response_param.desc: The number of SKU orders created by users from the LIVE

response_param.name: ^^^^sku_order_rate
response_param.desc: Number of SKU orders from the LIVE divided by the impressions of the LIVE

response_param.name: ^next_page_token
response_param.desc: Page token for the next page request.

response_param.name: ^total_count
response_param.desc: Total number of intervals.

sample_code.label: Go
Node.js
Java

scope_list.package_description: The application will be able to access TikTok shop analytics such as live and video, GMV, orders and content traffic data such as CTR, visitors for a shop and products in shop.
scope_list.auth_info: The application will be able to access your prior and go-forward TikTok Shop sales and traffic data by Shop and product, including but not limited to GMV, Number of orders, units sold, Number of buyers, product listings, product impressions and page views, Number of visitors, and click through rate (CTR), all by content type (video, live and product card).
